creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This sounds like a DNS issue to me.  You should check that you 
have DNS set up correctly, and that your hostname and IP address 
both resolve correctly, or that you have an entry in /etc/hosts 
for your own machine. 

I'm closing this PR as it doesn't seem to be a problem with FreeBSD 
itself, if the above advice doesn't help I'd suggest you post your 
question to freebsd-questions@FreeBSD.org or to the forums at 
http://forums.freebsd.org/ as they are a better place to get help 
for issues such as this.
